_comment: Pipeline-specific autonomous-mode settings merged with user's existing settings at runtime. User settings take precedence. Paths that reference ~/.claude/hooks/* are user-env hooks inherited from the host environment; inline shell is executed under the user's shell and Bash(*) gating.

hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FP=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // .tool_input.pattern // empty'); [ -z "$FP" ] && exit 0; printf '%s' "$FP" | grep -qE '(^|/)\.claude(/|$)' || exit 0; printf '%s' "$FP" | grep -qE '(^|/)\.claude/worktrees/' && exit 0; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Access to .claude/ directory is restricted in autonomous mode."}'

BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Cannot edit on main/master. Create a feature branch first."}'; exit 0; fi

FP=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if printf '%s' "$FP" | grep -qE '(\.env[^/]*$|/secrets/)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Protected file: requires human review."}'; exit 0; fi; if printf '%s' "$FP" | grep -qE '/migrations/'; then ROOT=$(cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$ROOT" ]; then REL="${FP#$ROOT/}"; if git -C "$ROOT" cat-file -e "main:$REL" 2>/dev/null; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Applied migration (exists on main): cannot edit in autonomous mode."}'; fi; fi; fi

SQL=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.sql // .tool_input.query // ""' | tr '[:lower:]' '[:upper:]'); if echo "$SQL" | grep -q 'DROP DATABASE'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"DROP DATABASE blocked."}'; exit 0; fi; if echo "$SQL" | grep -q 'DROP SCHEMA'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"DROP SCHEMA blocked."}'; exit 0; fi; for KW in TRUNCATE GRANT REVOKE; do if echo "$SQL" | grep -qw "$KW"; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"'"$KW"' blocked in autonomous mode."}'; exit 0; fi; done

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); for PAT in 'rm -rf' 'rm -r /' 'DROP TABLE' 'DROP DATABASE' 'chmod 777' 'curl.*\|.*sh' 'wget.*\|.*sh'; do if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "$PAT"; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Blocked dangerous command pattern"}'; exit 0; fi; done
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; echo '{"suppressOutput": true}'

if [ -z "${FACTORY_TASK_ID:-}" ]; then exit 0; fi; FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(test|spec)\.(ts|tsx)$'; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npx vitest run --reporter=dot --findRelatedTests "$FILE" --passWithNoTests 2>&1 | tail -10; fi

AUDIT=.claude/tool-audit.jsonl; if [ -f "$AUDIT" ] && [ $(stat -f%z "$AUDIT" 2>/dev/null || stat -c%s "$AUDIT" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) -gt 10485760 ]; then mv "$AUDIT" "$AUDIT.old"; fi; jq -c --arg ts "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" --arg task "${FACTORY_TASK_ID:-interactive}" '{ts: $ts, task: $task, tool: .tool_name, target: (.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.command // null)}' >> "$AUDIT" 2>/dev/null || true

[ -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/package.json" ] || exit 0; grep -q vitest "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/package.json" || exit 0; cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && npx vitest run --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tail -40; TEST=$?; if [ $TEST -ne 0 ]; then echo 'STOP GATE FAILED: tests failing. Fix all issues.'; exit 1; fi
